name: Sunny Girl
short_description: Enjoy cute girls in the background of gentle music and complete puzzles. The game is a jigsaw puzzle, where players move puzzle pieces to restore the original image.
detailed_description:
Enjoy cute girls in the background of gentle music and complete puzzles.
The game is a jigsaw puzzle, where players move puzzle pieces to restore the original image.

GamePlay :

Game with many levels playing with different levels in each level.
Change the position of the puzzle pieces logically to complete the game.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
